nodes.label: deals/views.py DRF API views for the PE Deals app.  URL namespace: api/deals/
GET /api/deals/projects/<uuid>/qoe-analysis/     Returns latest report or trigg
PATCH /api/deals/projects/<uuid>/qoe-analysis/<id>/     Manual edit of the QoE
POST /api/deals/portfolio/monte-carlo/     Runs a Monte Carlo simulation for a
CRUD for investment valuations.     GP staff only. Investors see restricted inf
